snippet.title: Odissea | Nuovo Trailer Ufficiale (Universal Pictures) - HD
snippet.description:
Al cinema dal 16 07 2026.
Seguici anche su: 
Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/universalpicturesinternationalitaly  
Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/universalpicturesita  
Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/universalpicsit  
http://www.odissea-ilfilm.it

Cast: Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson, Lupita Nyong’o, Zendaya, Charlize Theron
Scritto e diretto da: Christopher Nolan 
Prodotto da: Emma Thomas, Christopher Nolan 
Produttore Esecutivo: Thomas Hayslip

Il prossimo film di Christopher Nolan, Odissea, è un film epico d’azione dal respiro mitico girato in diverse parti del mondo utilizzando una nuovissima tecnologia di ripresa IMAX®. Il film porta per la prima volta il poema fondativo di Omero sugli schermi IMAX® e uscirà nelle sale italiane il 16 luglio 2026.

Odissea vede protagonisti Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson e Lupita Nyong’o, con Zendaya e Charlize Theron.

Odissea è prodotto da Emma Thomas e Christopher Nolan con la loro società, Syncopy. Il produttore esecutivo è Thomas Hayslip.

snippet.title: Resident Evil | Dal 17 settembre al cinema | Teaser trailer
snippet.description:
Dalla mente del visionario regista Zach Cregger (Weapons, Barbarian) arriva una nuova e terrificante interpretazione del franchise di Resident Evil. snippet.title: Subnautica 2 Early Access Cinematic Trailer
snippet.description:
Subnautica 2 is an underwater survival adventure game set on an all-new alien world. It is the next chapter in the Subnautica universe, developed by Unknown Worlds.

Driven from your home by ongoing conflict, Alterra offers you the chance at a new life. But as the colony ship CICADA shepherds you and your fellow Pioneers to your new home, something goes awry. The ship’s AI insists that your mission should continue. Stranded and faced with near-insurmountable odds, you must do everything in your power to survive. The future of humanity on this world is in your hands.

Subnautica 2 enters Early Access on May 14th, 2026, at 08:00 PDT / 15:00 UTC.

E io non la dimenticherò più

Dove tu forse non stonerai più

[Verse 1]
Share my life, take me for what I am
'Cause I'll never change all my colors for you
Take my love, I'll never ask for too much
Just all that you are and everything that you do

[Pre-Chorus]
I don't really need to look very much further
I don't wanna have to go where you don't follow
I won't hold it back again, this passion inside
Can't run from myself, there's nowhere to hide

[Chorus]
But don't make me close one more door
I don't wanna hurt anymore
Stay in my arms if you dare
Or must I imagine you there
Don't walk away from me
I have nothing, nothing, nothing
If I don't have you, you, you, you, you

[Verse 2]
You see through, right to the heart of me
You break down my walls with the strength of your love, mm
I never knew love like I've known it with you
Will our memories survive? One I can hold on to

[Pre-Chorus]
I don't really need to look very much further
I don't wanna have to go where you don't follow
I won't hold it back again, this passion inside
I can't run from myself, there's nowhere to hide
Your love, I'll remember forever

[Chorus]
But don't make me close one more door
I don't wanna hurt anymore
Stay in my arms if you dare
Or must I imagine you there
Don't walk away from me
I have nothing, nothing, nothing
Don't make me close one more door
I don't wanna hurt anymore
Stay in my arms if you dare
Or must I imagine you there
Don't walk away from me, no
Don't walk away from me
Don't you dare walk away from me
I have nothing, nothing, nothing
If I don't have you

[Outro]
You
If I don't have you
Oh, you

Lyrics

All that I want
Is to know undoubtedly

Could you make it clear

Is to sit here silently

Here to witness my devotion

I’m an anchor in the ocean
You know I could never leave

So I’m patient
You’re learning
Pretend it’s not hurting
Ohh

To not let good love slip away
So I’m cool and forgiving
I’ll take what you’re giving
Ohh

When I know that to get it I begged
Yeah to get it I begged

And I have this thought
When I lay in bed at night
That I feel trapped inside my life
Is that a normal thing
To fight back the waves
Of a static lovers’ dread
I’m overwhelmed, I’m underfed
And yet I still cling

Cling to hope like snow on mountains
Careless words melt it away
I’m a penny in a fountain
Just waiting on my luck to change

So I’m patient
You’re learning
Pretend it’s not hurting
Ohh

To not let good love slip away

I’ll take what you’re giving

snippet.title: Quando Ci Sei Tu
snippet.description:
Ci sono canzoni che si ascoltano…
e altre che si sentono dentro.

“Quando Ci Sei Tu” nasce così:
in silenzio, tra un respiro e un’emozione vera.

Una ballata intima, delicata, dove il pianoforte apre la strada
e la voce racconta qualcosa che tutti, almeno una volta, abbiamo vissuto:
la presenza di qualcuno che cambia tutto… senza bisogno di parole.

È una canzone d’amore, sì.
Ma non solo.

Parla di quella connessione profonda
che ti fa sentire al sicuro, anche nel buio.
Di qualcuno che resta… anche quando tutto il resto vacilla.

🎧 Chiudi gli occhi…
e lasciati portare.

🌊 Un viaggio tra i miei canali

🎥 Sicilia… il Paradiso in Terra → storie e leggende
🎶 Viaggiatore del Suono → canzoni ed emozioni
🌊 Sicilian Soulwave → solo musica, solo emozioni

👉 Iscriviti e continua il viaggio.

🎧 Nota sull’utilizzo dell’AI
Le voci di questo brano sono realizzate con strumenti di Intelligenza Artificiale.
Testo, musica, arrangiamento e progetto artistico sono originali e curati da me.
L’obiettivo è unire tecnologia ed emozione, mantenendo autenticità e visione personale.
